race.comment: DEEP KHARMA (6) was a comfortable trial winner and then led as favourite beaten a nose over 1000m at the Sunshine Coast. Comes back to a short sprint but will jump and run from the inside barrier and fitter she's the one to beat. HILLS OF MINTO (2) didn't appreciate the Gold Coast synthetic last start but had been tracking nicely on the turf there prior. Has to push over from an awkward gate over shorter but has been kept on the fresh side and can improve into the finish. THRILL SEEKER (9) led and made sharp improvement narrowly beaten at Gatton over 860m. Will strip fitter again and is sure to give a sight. BULLFIGHTER (1) was heavily backed first-up at Dalby and folded up from the speed. Had switched from a top Sydney barn and his best form stacks up. The shorter sprint should suit. KVAS (12) went close at Dalby and then wasn't far away at Toowoomba. She won't be too far away.
